tracks.meaning: a rigid structure of wooden or metal members that forms the basic skeleton of a building or other structure
the structure of bones and tissue that forms the skeleton of a human or animal body
a single image or picture in a sequence of images that make up a video or animation
to construct or assemble something within a fixed structure or border
to construct a false or misleading narrative to incriminate someone
a mental structure or pattern used to interpret and organize information about the world
a system or structure within which something is presented or discussed
the area or space defined by a border or boundary
a theatrical or dramatic presentation of a scene or narrative
to falsely incriminate or set up someone for a crime they did not commit
a complete set of ten pins in bowling that must be knocked down
a specific period or interval of time within which something occurs
the structure that surrounds and supports a window, door, or other opening
a rigid structure designed to hold or display items
a border or edge used in printing or typesetting
